events.text: Wrote the assessment to `/app/answer.json`. Summary: missing shims under the base plate is a genuine stability hazard (unstable/rocking base, unreliable plumb, anchor-rod overload risk) — decision is `fail`, risk `high`, with immediate actions to halt further loading, install proper shim packs per AISC 303 §7, re-verify plumb/level, and keep bracing in place until corrected and inspected before grouting.
